module_header: module mux9_16(input [15:0] a, input [15:0] b, input [15:0] c, input [15:0] d, input [15:0] e, input [15:0] f, input [15:0] g, input [15:0] h, input [15:0] i, input [3:0] sel, output reg [15:0] out);
prompt: Implement a 9-to-1 16-bit multiplexer. sel values 0 through 8 select inputs a through i. Any other sel value should drive 16'hffff.
